name: pupfish-qlik
description: Make Claude Code fluent in Qlik Sense. 12 skills covering data modeling, load scripts, expressions, performance, visualization, QA, source profiling, and Cloud MCP integration. 7 specialist agents (data architect, script developer, expression developer, viz architect, requirements analyst, QA reviewer, doc writer) for ad-hoc invocation. No rigid workflow. Invoke skills and agents as needed.
